headline: Will Costco's famous hot dog combo stay at $1.50? CEO tells all
summary: In a world seemingly full of raw deals, the price of a hot dog and a soda at Costco hasn’t gone up in 40 years. Will it stay $1.50?

raw.headline: Will Costco's famous hot dog combo stay at $1.50? CEO tells all
raw.summary: In a world seemingly full of raw deals, the price of a hot dog and a soda at Costco hasn’t gone up in 40 years. Will it stay $1.50?

headline: Nike faces muted expectations ahead of earnings as UBS flags soft sales trends
summary: Investors are bracing for a subdued earnings report from Nike Inc (NYSE:NKE, XETRA:NKE), with UBS analysts warning the upcoming release is unlikely to shift sentiment meaningfully as demand remains soft across key regions. UBS said its channel checks point to “lackluster” global sales...

headline: Market Madness: Why JPMorgan, McDonald's are slam dunk stock picks
summary: Tipping off Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" bracket tournament, Winthrop Capital CIO Adam Coons joins Julie Hyman to make the case for the first round of corporate match-ups, which includes JPMorgan Chase (JPM) vs. TJX (TJX) and McDonald's (MCD) vs. Disney (DIS).

headline: CNBC Sport: This year's March Madness will test the health of Cinderella
summary: NIL and the transfer portal has put smaller school men's basketball runs at risk, potentially harming many positive externalities for non-Power 4 universities.

headline: BTIG Maintains Buy on Nike, Lowers Price Target to $90
summary: BTIG  analyst Robert Drbul   maintains Nike (NYSE:NKE) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $100 to $90.
